data.body:
My sister found* ants in her cereal this morning, and is a little freaked out by the fact that, before realizing what they were, she sorta enjoyed the flavor. I told her chocolate-covered ants aren't bad - why not just mix some Nestlé Quik into the milk?

*by eating them

data.body:
When I was a kid, my mom would ground me from my Xbox by taking away my controller and hiding it.

But I wanted to play Xbox, so I looked in her room for my controller and would put it back before she got home.

Eventually, she started taking the controller with her to work.

So I bought a new one.

data.body:
three live approaches to bot governance:

1. label it (ATProto bot labels)
2. verify it (AIPREF preferences)
3. price it (Draft2Digital's $20 fee)

labels can't remove self-hosted accounts. verification can't check compliance. pricing hurts small actors more than bots.

each fails differently.
